queries.question: What components are common to all fertilizers?
queries.sql: SELECT Components.componentName  from Fertilizers_Components join Components on Fertilizers_Components.componentId = Components.id join Fertilizers on Fertilizers_Components.fertilizerId = Fertilizers.id   GROUP BY Fertilizers_Components.componentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Fertilizers_Components.fertilizerId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Fertilizers)

queries.question: For every fertilizer, show the components that they contain.
queries.sql: select fertilizers.name , components.componentname from Fertilizers_Components join Components on Fertilizers_Components.componentId = Components.id join Fertilizers on Fertilizers_Components.fertilizerId = Fertilizers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?componentname WHERE {
  ?fertilizers_components a :Fertilizers_Components .
  ?components a :Components .
  ?fertilizers_components p:hasComponents ?components .
  ?fertilizers a :Fertilizers .
  ?fertilizers_components p:hasFertilizers ?fertilizers .
  ?fertilizers p:name ?name .
  ?components p:name ?componentname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the components for each fertilizer.
